name: aberdeen-1995-data-warehouse-olap
title: Data Warehouse Query Tools: Evolving to Relational OLAP
description: Frictionless Data Package archiving Aberdeen Group Market Viewpoint Vol.8 No.8 (July 1995). Analyzes the evolution of data warehouse query tools toward Relational OLAP (ROLAP), examining multidimensional analysis, vendor competitive strategies, and the convergence of OLAP and relational database technologies. Contains structured extractions of entities, technologies, and observations from the original study.

sources.title: Data Warehouse Query Tools: Evolving to Relational OLAP
sources.author: Aberdeen Group
sources.description: Original Aberdeen Group Market Viewpoint, Volume 8/Number 8, July 7, 1995. Archived via Wayback Machine.

resources.description: All factual claims, market data, predictions, assessments, and benchmarks extracted from the study. Each row represents a discrete observation traceable to a source page.
